findings.finding: Task 9 unit test asserts only that git runs with cwd=worktree; it cannot detect a production no-op (absent home-repo worktree key) or a helper that stages the wrong files. No integration test is added.
findings.reviewer_angle: R10 plan-commit worktree mechanism: implementability and regression risk
findings.evidence_quote: Add a unit test asserting the helper runs `git` with `cwd` = the integration worktree

findings.finding: An OOV feature batch_plan.py excludes during round setup never reaches feature_executor, so the sole guaranteed complexity_normalized emission never fires and the normalization is silently lost.
findings.evidence_quote: Also emit from the pre-flight `batch_plan.py` path **only if** an overnight-events-log path is threaded there

findings.finding: execute_feature runs per-feature per-round and parse_feature_plan runs unconditionally inside it, so a resumed/re-dispatched feature re-emits the same complexity_normalized event each round with no idempotency guard, inflating the report.
